data.name: checkBoxCompound.ToolTip
data.value: Treat the element as a cation and combine it with an anion group (oxide, hydroxide, etc.); shows the compound-formula row.

data.name: comboBoxCompound.ToolTip
comboBoxElement.ToolTip
data.value: Select the chemical element (Z = 1-97); its typical valence is filled in automatically.

data.name: numericBoxMolarRatio.ToolTip
data.value: Set the molar ratio (relative number of moles) of this component.

data.name: numericBoxValence.ToolTip
data.value: Set the valence (oxidation state, ionic charge) of the selected element; determines the stoichiometry when combined with an anion group.

data.name: numericBoxWeight.ToolTip
data.value: Set the weight fraction of this component, in percent (%).

data.name: textBoxCompoundForm.ToolTip
data.value: Shows the compound chemical formula built from the cation and the selected anion group; editable only when Custom is selected.

data.name: label4.ToolTip
data.value: Select the chemical element (Z = 1-97); its typical valence is filled in automatically.

data.name: label5.ToolTip
data.value: Set the valence (oxidation state, ionic charge) of the selected element; determines the stoichiometry when combined with an anion group.

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Set the weight fraction of this component, in percent (%).

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Set the molar ratio (relative number of moles) of this component.

data.name: label9.ToolTip
data.value: Set the weight fraction of this component, in percent (%).
